A 8-bit ripple counter having identical flip flops with propagation delay of 20 nsec will have a maximum input frequency limit of _______ MHz.

NAT
Correct answer: 6.25 (6.15 - 6.35)
Solution

6.25 (6.15 - 6.35)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following is not an application of a grey code?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
• The grey code is used in transmission of digital signal as it reduces occurrence of error.
• The cyclic property of grey code makes it useful for angle measurement.
• It is generally used with position disk as a position indicator.
